## Compliance impact

> Check every box honestly. Compliance review happens at PR time, not after merge.

- [ ] **SOC 2 control affected.** (Access control, change management, audit log, monitoring, incident response, data retention.) Which control(s)? `____`
- [ ] **LGPD personal-data flow changed.** (New collection point, new storage location, new processor, changed retention, changed deletion behavior.) Detail: `____`
- [ ] **Data-residency change.** (New region, new vendor, new transfer of data across borders.) Detail: `____`
- [ ] **New external service dependency.** (Vendor, secret, IAM scope.) Detail: `____`
- [ ] **None of the above** — this PR has no compliance impact.

If any box above is checked, the [`compliance/`](../compliance/) artifacts (policies, audit-controls, runbooks) may need an update in the same PR or a follow-up. Flag the reviewer.

## Customer-visible change

- [ ] **Yes** — this affects something customers see (API behavior, dashboard, pricing, SLA, error messages). [`CHANGELOG.md`](../CHANGELOG.md) updated; [`VERSION`](../VERSION) bumped if appropriate.
- [ ] **No** — internal refactor, doc-only, or CI-only change. No CHANGELOG/VERSION change needed.

## Generated by Claude

- [ ] This PR was authored (in whole or significant part) by an AI coding agent — Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, or similar.

We don't reject AI-authored PRs, but we want the audit trail and we read those diffs with extra care.
